message:
refactor: Split runtime.zig into focused modules

Extract logical groups of functions from the 2565-line runtime.zig:

New modules in packages/runtime/src/runtime/:
- tuple_runtime.zig (185 lines): tupleConcat, tupleMultiply, tupleRepeat, sliceRepeatDynamic
- type_builtins.zig (64 lines): boolBuiltin, intBuiltin, strBuiltin, etc.
- whitespace.zig (48 lines): isUnicodeWhitespace, isUnicodeCodepointWhitespace, isStringAllWhitespace
- container_ops.zig (102 lines): setEqual, arrayLessThan
- format_ops.zig (41 lines): FormatMode, formatInt

runtime.zig now imports and re-exports from these modules for backwards
compatibility. Reduced from 2565 to 2277 lines.
